name: Deoxys Delta Attack Forme - Holon Phantoms

abilities.name: Form Change
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may search your deck for another Deoxys and switch it with Deoxys. (Any cards attached to Deoxys, damage counters, Special Conditions, and effects on it are now on the new Pokémon.) If you do, put Deoxys on top of your deck. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Energy Loop
attacks.text: Return 2 Energy attached to Deoxys to your hand.

tests.name: form_change_swaps
tests.description: Test Form Change swaps with another Deoxys

tests.name: energy_loop_returns_energy
tests.description: Test Energy Loop returns 2 Energy to hand
